main.description: Open a relay channel. The subscriber presents a com.fedproxy.temp.xrpc.registration: a record signed (network.attested.signature) over the nonce previously issued by com.fedproxy.temp.xrpc.getRegistrationNonce. The relay verifies the registration's signatures against the issued nonce and the did:key, then binds the WebSocket to that key. On connect the relay sends a #registered frame with the assigned serviceId/proxyRef; subsequent #request frames carry inbound XRPC calls the subscriber answers with #response frames.

registration.description: The full com.fedproxy.temp.xrpc.registration object as URL-encoded JSON, signing the nonce from getRegistrationNonce. Sent inline (not an AT-URI) so the subscriber needs no PDS to host the record.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: Registration signatures do not verify against the issued nonce or did:key, or the nonce is unknown/expired.

registered.description: First frame sent by the relay on connect, assigning this subscriber a serviceId.

serviceId.description: Opaque id the relay assigns to this subscriber for the connection lifetime.

proxyRef.description: did:web:HOST#serviceId value callers pass as the atproto-proxy header to route XRPC calls to this subscriber.

request.description: An inbound XRPC call relayed to the subscriber to handle.

params.description: Query params as a map of string keys to string values.

response.description: The subscriber's reply to a #request, keyed by the same requestId.
